name: repo-standards
description: Preferred GitHub repository standards, audited and applied with `gh` — a repo-settings baseline (wiki/projects off, auto-delete merged branches, read-only workflow token, SHA-pinned actions, Dependabot security updates), three branch-ruleset classes, a Dependabot version-updates config, a lightweight tier for content/asset/config repos, the README/CONTRIBUTING/CLAUDE.md doc split, and a knowledge-base standard (CLAUDE.md as a ~100-line map with hybrid eager-imports + lazy routing, an in-repo PRD-or-CONTRACT + TESTING docs/ minimum, invariants and authority-boundary sections, hub-and-spoke package docs). Ships templates plus a read-only repo-standards-auditor agent for per-repo (fan-out) conformance audits.
